---
listing:
  - id: featured-listing
    contents: .
    include:
      categories: [featured]
    fields: [date, title, subtitle, image, categories, reading-time]
    image-height: 150px
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
  - id: post-listing
    contents: .
    fields: [date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
    image-height: 150px
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 15
    feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Featured

::: {#featured-listing}
:::

## All Posts

::: {#post-listing}
:::
